summary: Classified the ten listed open PR candidates from the hydrated preflight artifact. This shard is PR inventory, not a dedupe cluster, so no shared canonical was selected and no close/merge/fix actions were planned. Eight PRs are kept independent for maintainer/backlog review, #92394 is quarantined for central security handling, and #91245 needs a maintainer decision because dependency graph changes are explicitly blocked and the author has active follow-up.

actions.reason: Open focused PR with unresolved review/proof gates; keep as its own independent candidate for maintainer or author follow-up.
Distinct Feishu redaction PR with passing proof checks; no closure, merge, or fix action is available in this shard.
Security-sensitive route-only item; send to central OpenClaw security handling and continue unrelated non-security classification.
Focused open PR with passing proof checks; keep independent because this shard has no shared canonical and merge is blocked by job policy.
Distinct memory-wiki fix candidate linked to an open issue; keep independent for normal review.
Open canonical-looking heartbeat PR for its own issue family, but this shard cannot merge or close linked issues; keep independent.
Distinct gateway stale-module import fix candidate; keep independent because closure and merge gates are not satisfied.
Draft broad reliability build with failed proof; keep independent rather than closing because low-signal closeout is disabled and no shared canonical exists.
Clean open replacement PR for its own closed predecessor, but merge/post-merge close actions are disabled; keep independent.
Maintainer/admin decision is required for blocked dependency graph changes and active author follow-up; do not close, merge, or label from this worker.

needs_human: #91245 requires maintainer/admin review for dependency graph authorization and active author follow-up.
